_comment: Sources for public/data/feeds.json. Each entry has: kind (youtube-user | youtube-channel | rss), id/url, feed bucket, optional stateTag. For YouTube: 'youtube-user' uses the legacy /user/USERNAME RSS form, 'youtube-channel' uses channel_id=UC...  If a 'user' URL 404s, find the UC... id at https://commentpicker.com/youtube-channel-id.php and switch kind.

sources.name: Heart Gallery Films
